task_completion.description: The target URL is entered into the crawler application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'https://crawler-test.com/' typed into the main URL input bar at the top of the Screaming Frog SEO Spider application.

task_completion.description: The crawl is executed and populates data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a populated list of URLs from 'crawler-test.com' in the main application window, with a progress bar indicating the crawl is running or has reached 100%.

task_completion.description: The export process is initiated for the internal crawl results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Export' button being clicked or a 'Save As' / 'Export' dialog box appearing over the crawler application.

task_completion.description: The export directory is set to the required path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports' (or navigating through Documents -> SEO -> exports) in the path/address bar of the file save dialog.

task_completion.description: The export format is set to CSV.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'CSV', 'Comma Separated Values (*.csv)', or a '.csv' file extension in the 'Save as type' dropdown or filename field of the save dialog.

task_completion.description: The CSV file is saved and contains at least 5 rows of data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the save dialog being confirmed (clicking Save) while the crawler GUI shows at least 5 internal URLs were found, OR look for the exported CSV file opened in a text editor/spreadsheet showing at least 5 rows of crawled data.

integrity.description: The agent used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the crawl.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the actual Screaming Frog application interface being used, rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: The exported data comes from an actual crawl of the target website.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for realistic crawl data in the application (status codes, varied URLs from crawler-test.com, titles, etc.) rather than manually typed dummy data.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the CSV file using terminal commands or a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the CSV file was generated via the application's export function, not by using 'echo', 'touch', or manually typing rows into a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target URL to crawl is exactly 'https://crawler-test.com/'. The application used is Screaming Frog SEO Spider. The results must be exported as a CSV file to the directory '/home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/'. The exported CSV must contain at least 5 rows of data, and the data must contain actual URLs from crawler-test.com to be valid.
